emails.subject: Enron Kids Holiday Party
emails.body: Enron Kids Holiday Party There will be 3 vans downstairs on Thursday, Dec. 14 that will be transporting sponsors every 15-20 minutes starting at 10am. We should try to be there at least 30 minues before our 1st break (11:39), so let's try to leave around 11am-ish? Nicole
